title: Member can log in and land on member dashboard
description: Verifies a member can authenticate with email/password and is redirected to the member dashboard with key summary content visible.

title: Member dashboard shows key overview sections after login
description: Verifies that a logged-in member can open the dashboard and see upcoming sessions, program progress, and weight stats sections.

steps.description: Verify text "Training Program Progress" is visible

title: Upcoming sessions section is visible on the member dashboard
description: Verifies the upcoming sessions overview area is present and readable on the dashboard.

steps.description: Verify element "Upcoming Sessions" section is visible

title: Training program progress section is visible on the member dashboard
description: Verifies the program progress overview area is present on the dashboard for a logged-in member.

steps.description: Verify text "Training Program Progress" is visible
Verify element "Training Program Progress" section is visible

title: Weight tracking stats section is visible on the member dashboard
description: Verifies the dashboard displays weight tracking statistics/visualization for a logged-in member.

steps.description: Verify element "Weight" stats section is visible

title: Daily tasks and goals are visible on the member dashboard
description: Verifies the dashboard shows daily tasks/goals section to the member.

steps.description: Verify element "Daily Tasks" section is visible

title: Navigate from dashboard to Programs via the Programs menu item
description: Verifies a member can use dashboard navigation to reach the Training Programs page.

title: Login fails with invalid credentials from the login page
description: Verifies the user cannot log in with an incorrect email/password combination and remains on the login screen with an error message.

title: Book an available training slot successfully and verify it appears on the dashboard
description: Verifies a member can book an available slot with notes, see a confirmation, and then see the session listed on the dashboard.

steps.description: Click on "Booking" in the main navigation

title: Complete booking flow with notes and verify confirmation message is shown
description: Verifies booking notes can be entered and a booking confirmation is shown after confirming.

steps.description: Click on "Booking" in the main navigation
Verify element "Available training slots" is visible
Click on the first available time slot in the list

title: Confirm booking after selecting a slot and entering booking notes
description: Verifies the member can select a slot, enter notes, and confirm the booking.

steps.description: Click on "Booking" in the main navigation
Click on the first available time slot in the list
Type "Need form check on squat" into the booking notes field

title: See booking confirmation after clicking Confirm booking
description: Verifies that after confirming a booking, the UI shows a visible booking confirmation state/message.

steps.description: Click on "Booking" in the main navigation
Click on the first available time slot in the list

title: After successful booking, verify the booked session is listed on the member dashboard
description: Verifies navigation to dashboard after booking and that the booked session is visible in the sessions list.

steps.description: Click on "Booking" in the main navigation
Click on the first available time slot in the list

title: Attempt to book a full slot and verify 'slot unavailable' error appears and user remains on booking page
description: Verifies booking a full slot shows the correct error message and does not navigate away from the booking page.

steps.description: Click on "Booking" in the main navigation
Click on a time slot marked as "Full"

title: Verify 'slot unavailable' error message text is visible after trying to confirm a full slot
description: Verifies the exact error message 'slot unavailable' is displayed when booking a full slot.

steps.description: Click on "Booking" in the main navigation
Click on a time slot marked as "Full"

title: On slot unavailable error, verify the user remains on /booking
description: Verifies that after an unavailable slot attempt, the user does not leave the booking page.

steps.description: Click on "Booking" in the main navigation
Click on a time slot marked as "Full"

title: View program details, exercises, nutrition, and complete a daily task
description: Verifies a member can open a training program, browse exercises and nutrition tabs, and mark a daily task as completed.

title: Open a training program from the programs list and see program details
description: Verifies a member can open a program and see its details section load on the program page.

steps.description: Click on the first training program in the list

title: Switch to Fitness Center Exercises tab within an opened program
description: Verifies a member can navigate to the exercises view within a selected training program.

steps.description: Click on the first training program in the list

title: Switch to Nutrition Guide tab within an opened program
description: Verifies a member can view the nutrition guide section/tab for a selected training program.

steps.description: Click on the first training program in the list

title: Mark a daily task as completed and see completed state
description: Verifies a member can mark a daily task complete and the UI reflects that completion.

steps.description: Click on the first training program in the list

title: Verify error message is displayed after failed save attempt
description: Verifies the specific failure message 'unable to update program' is visible after a save attempt fails.

steps.description: Click on the first training program in the list

title: Remain on program page after save failure (no unexpected navigation)
description: Verifies the user stays on the program page after clicking Save changes and encountering an update failure.

title: Programs page loads and shows at least one program entry
description: Verifies the programs page loads successfully and displays available training programs for the member.

steps.description: Verify element "Training program list" is visible

title: Add a valid weight entry and see confirmation
description: Verifies a member can submit a valid weight entry with a date and receives a visible success confirmation.

steps.description: Click on "Weight Tracking" in the main navigation

title: Successful submission updates chart and shows latest value in statistics
description: Verifies submitting a new valid weight entry updates the visible chart and the on-page statistics reflect the new entry.

steps.description: Click on "Weight Tracking" in the main navigation
Type "180" into the weight input field

title: Reject non-numeric weight with validation error
description: Verifies the form blocks non-numeric weight values and shows the validation message to enter a valid weight.

steps.description: Click on "Weight Tracking" in the main navigation
Type "abc" into the weight input field
Verify text "enter a valid weight" is visible

title: Prevent submission when weight is empty
description: Verifies the form does not submit when the weight field is blank and shows a visible validation message.

steps.description: Click on "Weight Tracking" in the main navigation

title: Prevent submission when date is not selected
description: Verifies the form does not submit when no date is chosen and a date-related validation message is visible.

steps.description: Click on "Weight Tracking" in the main navigation
Type "175" into the weight input field

title: Load existing weight entries and render chart and statistics
description: Verifies that the weight tracking page loads and displays the progress chart and statistics sections for the member.

steps.description: Click on "Weight Tracking" in the main navigation
Verify element "Weight progress chart" is visible

title: Submit using Enter key from the weight input
description: Verifies the user can submit a valid weight entry by pressing Enter (keyboard submission) and sees a success confirmation.

steps.description: Click on "Weight Tracking" in the main navigation
Type "172" into the weight input field

title: Coach can open Coach Dashboard and view today's sessions schedule
description: Verifies an authenticated coach can access the Coach Dashboard and see the sessions schedule section.

title: Coach can open a member from the list and view progress stats section
description: Verifies selecting a member from the Coach Dashboard shows the member progress stats area.

steps.description: Click on the first member in the member list
Verify element "member progress stats" is visible

title: Coach can view member weight tracking section after selecting a member
description: Verifies that after choosing a member, the weight tracking visualization/section is visible on the Coach Dashboard.

steps.description: Click on the first member in the member list

title: Coach can navigate from Coach Dashboard to Program Management via quick link
description: Verifies the Program Management navigation from the Coach Dashboard works and lands on the correct route.

steps.description: Click the "Program Management" link or button

title: Coach Dashboard shows member list section on load
description: Verifies the Coach Dashboard includes a visible member list area for quick selection.

title: Create a new training program with exercises, nutrition guides, and daily tasks
description: Verifies a coach can create and save a complete training program and see it listed in Program Management.

steps.description: Click on "Program Management" in the navigation menu
Fill "Strength Cut Plan" into the program name field
Fill "Back Squat" into the exercise name field
Fill "High protein, moderate carbs" into the nutrition guide field
Fill "Drink 2L water" into the daily task field
Verify text "Strength Cut Plan" is visible

title: Coach can view upcoming availability slots
description: Verifies a coach can log in and see the Manage Availability page with the upcoming availability list visible.

steps.description: Click on "Manage Availability" in the app navigation

title: Coach adds a new availability slot successfully
description: Verifies a coach can add a new time slot with valid date/time and capacity and see it listed afterward.

steps.description: Click on "Manage Availability" in the app navigation
Click the "Add new time slot" button
Fill "09:00" into the start time field
Fill "10:00" into the end time field
Fill "3" into the slot capacity field

title: Required-field validation when saving an empty time slot form
description: Verifies the coach cannot save a new time slot without filling required date/time/capacity fields.

steps.description: Click on "Manage Availability" in the app navigation
Click the "Add new time slot" button

title: Validation error when end time is earlier than start time
description: Verifies the form blocks a time slot where the end time is before the start time.

steps.description: Click on "Manage Availability" in the app navigation
Click the "Add new time slot" button
Fill "11:00" into the start time field
Fill "10:00" into the end time field
Fill "1" into the slot capacity field

title: Coach can cancel adding a slot and return to the availability list
description: Verifies the coach can abandon the add-slot flow and return to the list without saving.

steps.description: Click on "Manage Availability" in the app navigation
Click the "Add new time slot" button
